description: Accounts in Arabic script for the sale of cotton. Dated 9 R[amaḍan] [..]90 AH, omitting the first two digits. Given the mention of the ق qurush currency symbol throughout, minted post-1690 CE, the year is either 1190 AH or 1290 AH. The former year/date, equivalent to Oct. 1776 CE, seems more likely based on the paleography but there may be mention of additional currencies that rule out the eighteenth century. MCD.
description_he: חשבונות בכתב ערבי למכירת כותנה. מתוארך 9 ר[מדאן] [..]90 להג'רה. בהתחשב במטבע הקורוש המוזכר, שהוטבע לאחר 1690 לספירה, השנה היא 1190 או 1290 להג'רה. MCD.
